name: polis
description: Context engineering + spec-driven development with isolated subagents for Cursor.
//: Cursor has no formal plugin.json. Its real extension surface is: hooks at .cursor/hooks.json (events: beforeSubmitPrompt, beforeShellExecution, afterFileEdit, stop, ...), rules at .cursor/rules/*.mdc, and instructions in AGENTS.md. This descriptor is metadata; scripts/install.sh emits the actual files. The CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT env var points at the installed copy so hook scripts can resolve their own path.
